name: 15q11_2_BP1_BP2_microdeletion
description: 15q11.2 BP1-BP2 recurrent microdeletion / microduplication (~500 kb), flanked by BP1 and BP2 SD blocks (HERC2P paralog cassettes) of the larger PWS/AS region. Lower penetrance susceptibility CNV for ID, epilepsy, schizophrenia, autism. The Burnside-Butler region. Critical genes: TUBGCP5, CYFIP1, NIPA1, NIPA2.

architecture.internal_structure: BP1 and BP2 are 200-400 kb SD clusters with HERC2P/GOLGA8 paralog cassettes at >99% identity (continuous with the PWS/AS region distally); unique core contains TUBGCP5, CYFIP1 (FMR1 interactor), NIPA1, NIPA2.
